text:
Once upon a time in a small town tucked away between rolling hills and serene forests, there lived an otter by the name of Olive. Olive was unlike any otter you'd ever meet – she didn’t swim in the ocean; instead, she loved exploring the nearby river, where she would gather bubbles from trickling springs.

One unusual day, Olive noticed something strange. Her usual frothy webbed feet no longer seemed interested in splashing through water. Instead, she’d spend hours looking intently at a speckled stone near the riverbank. That speckle turned out to be a curious little bug, which fascinated Olive.

In her quest to learn more about this peculiar creature, Olive decided to name it Mr. Glint. What made Mr. Glint so special wasn't just its glimmering stones, but the intricate dance Mr. Glint performed each night under the moonlight. At first, Olive just watched, enchanted by the way Mr. Glint spun softly
